title: Tunisian Chicken Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic stew originating from Tunisia, cooked in a traditional clay pot called a tagine. This dish is perfect for a cozy evening with family or friends.

ingredients.name: lemongrass paste
ingredients.notes: found in most grocery stores or online

ingredients.name: tagine spice blend
ingredients.notes: available in most Middle Eastern or North African markets

instructions: Heat oil in the bottom of a traditional tagine or large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add lemongrass paste, tagine spice blend, and lemon juice. Stir to combine.
Cover the tagine or pot and transfer to the oven. Cook at 300°F (150°C) for 25-30 minutes.
Stir in chopped cilantro and serve hot over couscous or rice.
